testcase.name: @AfterClass closeApplication
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.WebDriverException: Timed out waiting for driver server to stop. testcase.name: valiadatePolicyCount
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.remote.UnreachableBrowserException: Error communicating with the remote browser. It may have died.
